race.comment: DEAR JEWEL (10) returns from a let-up and is unlucky not to have a few more wins on the CV. Closed strongly in a solid rating contest with a narrow third over 1100m at Warwick Farm in BM72 class. Senior rider engaged and since fitted with an 821m tick over trial. Go close. FIORENZA (4) lightly raced mare resuming. Went quickly through the grades last prep with a narrow second over this trip in BM72 class. Fitted with the two trials and will appreciate the fast tempo. Hard to hold out. VINOLASS (3) savaged the line first-up from near last on the turn with a creditable fourth over 900m at Albury in the Flat Knacker. Comes to hand quickly and gets a key jockey change today. MADRINA (2) resumes after going to a new peak last preparation. Back without a trial and should be able to get some cover from the draw. Each-way.
